title: Sydney NYE Fireworks 2026
sourceName: Sydney New Year's Eve Official Site
summary: Official Sydney Harbour New Year's Eve fireworks information.
viewingTips: Use the official vantage point guide before choosing a viewing area. | Arrive early and follow capacity updates on the official site.
parkingTips: Central parking is limited during NYE road closures. | Prioritize public transport and official walking routes.
transitTips: Use Sydney public transport and check event-day changes before leaving. | Plan extra time for crowd-managed station exits.
safetyNotes: Stay inside designated viewing areas. | Follow police, transport, and event staff instructions.

title: London New Year Fireworks 2026
sourceName: London New Year's Eve Official Site
summary: Official London New Year's Eve fireworks and event guidance.
viewingTips: Check official ticketing and viewing guidance before travelling. | Bring warm layers and allow time for crowd-managed access.
parkingTips: Do not expect public parking around central celebration zones. | Use transit and official walking routes.
transitTips: Plan Tube and rail routes before leaving. | Expect station controls and post-event crowd management.
safetyNotes: Stay behind barriers until official release. | Follow police and event steward instructions.

title: New York City Times Square New Year 2027
summary: Times Square New Year's Eve includes the official ball drop at midnight with crowd-controlled pen access.
viewingTips: Spectator pens form between 42nd and 47th streets — gates open early afternoon. | After 3pm bags are screened; after 5pm pens lock and re-entry is impossible. | Liberty Lounge ticketed venues offer indoor warm-up with view of the ball.
parkingTips: All Times Square garages close to incoming traffic from 4pm December 31. | Best transit is from Midtown East via subway.
transitTips: MTA subway 1, 2, 3, 7, N, Q, R, S, W lines exit at Times Square - 42nd Street. | Eighth Avenue subway lines A, C, E also exit near Port Authority.
safetyNotes: NYPD restricts umbrellas, large bags, and folding chairs after 3pm. | No restroom access inside pens — restaurants east of Sixth Avenue stay open.

title: Las Vegas Strip New Year 2027 Fireworks
address: Las Vegas Boulevard, Las Vegas, NV
sourceName: Las Vegas Convention and Visitors Authority
summary: America's Party — the Las Vegas Strip's 8-minute, 7-resort synchronized rooftop fireworks at midnight.
viewingTips: Tropicana/Las Vegas Boulevard and Flamingo overpasses are the official public viewing areas. | Resort pool decks (Caesars, Aria, MGM) sell tickets but capacity is locked from 6pm.
parkingTips: Strip closes to vehicle traffic 6pm December 31 to 3am January 1. | Park off-Strip (Linq garage, Sahara garage) and walk in.
transitTips: RTC Deuce buses run extended hours but slow to walking pace. | Las Vegas Monorail runs continuously through 3am.
safetyNotes: Backpacks and large bags are banned in the pedestrian zone — bring small clear bags. | Alcohol sales transition to closed-container only after 8pm — open containers seized at the gate.

title: Miami Bayfront Park New Year 2027 Fireworks
summary: Bayfront Park hosts the City of Miami's New Year's Eve countdown and fireworks over Biscayne Bay.
viewingTips: Bayfront Park amphitheater is the main viewing area. | PortMiami eastern bulkhead has a quieter cross-bay view.
parkingTips: InterContinental and JW Marriott garages stay open through 3am. | Biscayne Boulevard closes 8pm to 2am.
safetyNotes: Bayfront security uses metal detectors — clear bags only.

title: Nashville Bash on Broadway New Year 2027
address: Broadway between 1st and 5th Ave, Nashville, TN
summary: Bash on Broadway is Nashville's flagship New Year's Eve celebration with the iconic Music Note Drop and fireworks.
viewingTips: Broadway between 1st and 4th gives the closest view of the Music Note Drop. | Cumberland Park (east bank) has the cleanest fireworks sightline.
parkingTips: Convention Center garage and Nissan Stadium lots stay open through 3am. | Broadway closes to vehicles 4pm December 31.
transitTips: WeGo bus routes 4, 7, 26 reroute around Lower Broadway.

title: Orlando New Year 2027 Fireworks at the Fountain
summary: Lake Eola Park hosts Orlando's free New Year's Eve fireworks.
viewingTips: East side of the lake (Eola Drive) is the best fountain framing. | Constitution Green stays quieter for families.
parkingTips: Library Central and CNL garages stay open through 2am.
transitTips: LYNX Lymmo Orange Line is free with stops at City Hall.
safetyNotes: Lake Eola has limited fencing; keep small children inland of the path.
